commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Worktrunk `step.copy-ignored` excludes for `.convex/` and `.env.local` in `.config/wt.toml` so local worktree env state remains symlink-managed.

Reproducibility: yes. The reproduction path is `wt --yes hook pre-start` in a worktree after `setup:worktree` creates `.env.local` and `.convex` symlinks; I did not rerun it locally, but the source path and PR live-output proof are coherent.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; there is no actionable patch defect and the remaining work is normal draft readiness plus check completion.

target.title: chore: exclude local env state from worktree copy
target.body:
## Summary

- What changed: configured Worktrunk `step.copy-ignored` to skip `.env.local` and `.convex/`.
- Why: `setup:worktree` intentionally creates those as symlinks to the primary local env and Convex state. Leaving them in the copy step can produce a noisy `.convex` refusal because the symlink resolves outside the destination worktree, even though the flow still works.

I kept the existing hook order so `setup:worktree` continues to own `.env.local` and `.convex`. Running `copy-ignored` first was tested and rejected because it can materialize those entries as local files/directories instead of the intended symlinks.

## Linked Issue

- Related #2325

## Screenshots

- [x] N/A

## Security / Trust Impact

- [x] No security/trust impact

## Data / Deploy Impact

- [x] No data/deploy impact

## Verification

- [x] `wt --yes hook pre-start` before the change reproduced the `.convex` refusal.
- [x] `wt --yes hook pre-start` after the change completed with `Copied 0 files · 0 B`.
- [x] `readlink .env.local` and `readlink .convex` confirmed both entries remain symlinks.
- [x] Repeated `wt --yes hook pre-start` stayed clean with no `.convex` refusal.
- [x] `bun run dev:worktree`; `wt --yes url`; local URL returned `200`; `wt --yes stop`.
- [x] `bunx vitest run scripts/setup-worktree.test.ts scripts/dev-worktree.test.ts`
- [x] `git diff --check`
- [x] `bun run ci:static`

## Notes

During the dev smoke, local Convex logged a schema validation error for existing local `skillSearchDigest` data containing an extra `latestVersionSkillId` field. The app URL still returned `200`, and `wt --yes stop` left no listener on the worktree app port or local Convex port. I left that out of scope here because this PR only changes the Worktrunk copy configuration.
